## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, site performance, and team updates.](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site traffic showing positive growth: 14K more impressions, 1,900 more clicks](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Content strategy progressing well; new educator (Graham) providing valuable feedback](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Potential geopolitical situation affecting team member Deya's availability; contingency plans in place](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Future plans include content refreshes, optimizing for LLM search, and refining blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)

## Topics

### Site Performance and Content Strategy

  - [Overall site impressions up by \~14K, clicks increased by \~1,900](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Blog content seeing 67 clicks in the past week](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Top performing pages: "AI homework helper tools" and "Engaging in history class using AI chatbots"](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [New performance tracker by David in development, will include LLM search metrics](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Future focus: content refreshes (3+ months old), merging similar topics, optimizing for clicks](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### Team Updates and Workflow

  - [Graham (educator/contractor) providing valuable content feedback](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Nikki's workload reduced with Graham's assistance](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Deya potentially affected by geopolitical situation; team prepared to adjust workflow if needed](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing feedback rounds and maintaining content flow](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### Technical Constraints and Future Plans

  - [Framer collection limit reached; future website rebuild planned for more flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Plans to improve blog structure, tagging, and categorization in future rebuild](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
  - [Upcoming performance tracker update to include LLM search metrics](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [High impressions with lower clicks not alarming at this stage](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Future plans to analyze zero-click pages and potential content merging](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Focus on AI-related content resonating well with educators](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenn to upload page in Framer and provide update on Deya's situation](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Monitor content performance, particularly new pages and site mapping effects](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Plan for content refreshes and optimization in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Prepare for future website rebuild to address structural limitations](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Continue focusing on AI-related content for educators](https://fathom.video/share/jHfSiyH6DzuGnnqCSyk_weGarztfkFzY?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
